name: Himsagor
description: The king of mangoes. Known for its unmatched sweetness and completely fiberless texture.

name: Amrupali
description: A very sweet, small to medium-sized mango with a deep orange, fiberless flesh.

name: Langra
description: Famous for retaining its green color even when ripe. Extremely juicy with a unique aroma.

name: Khirshapat
description: One of the most popular and premium varieties from Rajshahi, highly sought after for its rich, creamy flavor.
